body.title: Akien creates PyPI account and API tokens
body.description:
Before any UU/Igor/SWADL packages can be published, Akien needs a PyPI account and per-project API tokens. This is a pure external action — no code work.

**Affected files:** none
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: create account, generate tokens, store in .env. Out of scope: actual publish pipeline (that's T-uu-tagged-release etc.).
**Completion criteria:** .env contains PYPI_TOKEN_UU, PYPI_TOKEN_IGOR, PYPI_TOKEN_SWADL (or equivalent). The three publish tickets can then be ungated.
